subcodes.first_line: O thou who art esteemed and devoted unto God! How many men and how many women have awaited the manifestation of the countenance of Christ [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المحترمه المخلصه لله کم من رجال و کم من نساء انتظروا تجلی وجه المسیح بعد
subcodes.subjects: @early Christian persecutions; the Pharisees, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
